name: The Unlanded
descriptionSeed: The pure pole: those who never arrive anywhere at all. The Unlanded have kept walking so long they have stopped being able to stop, and they are not lost — they are past arrival as a category. Meeting them on a road is one of the loneliest experiences available to a person.
encounterFlavor: The Unlanded, who cannot stop and are not unhappy; someone who joined them a year ago and does not recognize you; the pull to just keep going.
questSeeds: A Walker's whole family has gone Unlanded and one of them left a message
Somebody has found where the Unlanded are GOING, and it is somewhere
